sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmap (id UInt32, bitmap_col AggregateFunction(groupBitmap, UInt32)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_bitmap VALUES (1, groupBitmap(1)), (2, groupBitmap(2)), (3, groupBitmap(3));
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapTransform(bitmap_col, [1, 2], [10, 20])) AS transformed_bm FROM test_bitmap;
UPDATE test_bitmap SET bitmap_col = bitmapTransform(bitmap_col, [3], [30]) WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapTransform(bitmap_col, [1, 2, 3], [100, 200, 300])) AS new_bm FROM test_bitmap WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3);
